articles.title: F1 betting markets react after Antonelli's China Win
articles.summary: F1 betting markets react after Antonelli's China Win. A first-ever Grand Prix win for the Mercedes teenager has had a big impact on the betting markets.

articles.title: All the key moments from the 2026 Chinese Grand Prix
articles.summary: All the key moments from the 2026 Chinese Grand Prix. As China played host to the first Sprint weekend of the 2026 season, Kimi Antonelli wrote his own history while Lewis Hamilton secured his first Ferrari podium.

articles.title: Wolff reflects on 'best moment' after Antonelli's maiden win
articles.summary: Wolff reflects on 'best moment' after Antonelli's maiden win. Mercedes Team Principal Toto Wolff admits that Kimi Antonelli's maiden Formula 1 victory in the Chinese Grand Prix was "one of the best moments I've had in F1".

articles.title: Bearman bags P5 after ‘deer in headlights’ Lap 1 scare
articles.summary: Bearman bags P5 after ‘deer in headlights’ Lap 1 scare. Ollie Bearman was all smiles after an impressive drive to fifth position in Sunday’s Chinese Grand Prix, having bounced back from a scary moment with Isack Hadjar on the opening lap.

articles.title: What the teams said – Race day in China
articles.summary: What the teams said – Race day in China. The drivers and teams report back on the Chinese Grand Prix from the Shanghai International Circuit.

articles.title: Leclerc 'enjoyed the fight' with Hamilton in battle for China podium
articles.summary: Leclerc 'enjoyed the fight' with Hamilton in battle for China podium. Charles Leclerc admits he "enjoyed the fight" with Ferrari team mate Lewis Hamilton in the Chinese Grand Prix, the pair battling for the final podium position in Sunday's race.

articles.title: Verstappen reveals reason for ‘frustrating’ retirement in China
articles.summary: Verstappen reveals reason for ‘frustrating’ retirement in China. Max Verstappen has explained the reasons behind his “frustrating” retirement from the Chinese Grand Prix, with the Dutchman admitting that Red Bull have a “lot to learn from” after a difficult weekend for the team.

articles.title: China 'one of the most enjoyable races I've had' - Hamilton
articles.summary: China 'one of the most enjoyable races I've had' - Hamilton. Lewis Hamilton claims the Chinese Grand Prix "was one of the most enjoyable races I’ve had" after a thrilling intra-team battle with Charles Leclerc, before claiming his first Grand Prix podium since joining Ferrari.

articles.title: Russell expects ‘tight year’ after ‘intense’ Chinese GP
articles.summary: Russell expects ‘tight year’ after ‘intense’ Chinese GP. George Russell is expecting a “tight year” ahead following his team mate Kimi Antonelli’s debut victory at the Chinese Grand Prix, with the Briton left to reflect on an “intense” day in which he claimed second place.

articles.title: Emotional Antonelli reacts to 'dream' maiden F1 win
articles.summary: Emotional Antonelli reacts to 'dream' maiden F1 win. An emotional Kimi Antonelli thanked his Mercedes team after "they helped me to achieve this dream" following the teenager's victory in the Chinese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Antonelli and Hamilton’s shared firsts hint at bright futures
articles.summary: Antonelli and Hamilton’s shared firsts hint at bright futures. While Kimi Antonelli enjoyed his first F1 win, the man he replaced marked a first of his own.

articles.title: Emotional Antonelli ends 20-year wait for Italian F1 winner
articles.summary: Emotional Antonelli ends 20-year wait for Italian F1 winner. Kimi Antonelli was on the verge of tears after becoming F1's newest winner – and the first from Italy since Giancarlo Fisichella in 2006.

articles.title: McLaren failed to make Chinese GP after separate power unit issues
articles.summary: McLaren failed to make Chinese GP after separate power unit issues. Unrelated issues on the same Mercedes power unit component meant McLaren's Chinese Grand Prix ended before it started.

articles.title: Antonelli claims first grand prix win in China
articles.summary: Antonelli claims first grand prix win in China. Kimi Antonelli led a Mercedes 1-2 as he claimed his first F1 win in Shanghai.

articles.title: Formula 1 officially postpones Bahrain and Saudi races
articles.summary: Formula 1 officially postpones Bahrain and Saudi races. The fourth and fifth rounds of the 2026 championship were due to take place on April 12 and 19 respectively.

articles.title: Antonelli checks off an inevitable record as youngest F1 polesitter
articles.summary: Antonelli checks off an inevitable record as youngest F1 polesitter. A first career pole for Kimi Antonelli before he turns 20 comes as no surprise, now a first win awaits.

articles.title: Russell feared P10 start after issues hampered Chinese Grand Prix qualifying
articles.summary: Russell feared P10 start after issues hampered Chinese Grand Prix qualifying. George Russell will start the Chinese Grand Prix from the front row, but he thought he might have to be further back after car problems in Q3.

articles.title: ‘The car is completely undriveable’ - Verstappen struggles to make a mark in China
articles.summary: ‘The car is completely undriveable’ - Verstappen struggles to make a mark in China. Red Bull appears to have fallen further down the order in Shanghai.

articles.title: Antonelli becomes F1’s youngest polesitter in Chinese GP qualifying
articles.summary: Antonelli becomes F1’s youngest polesitter in Chinese GP qualifying. Kimi Antonelli broke Sebastian Vettel's 18-year record for youngest polesitter as his Mercedes teammate George Russell battled car issues.

articles.title: Russell survives early scrap with Hamilton to win Shanghai Sprint
articles.summary: Russell survives early scrap with Hamilton to win Shanghai Sprint. Mercedes maintained its dominance at the front of the pack as Russell held off the Ferraris of Hamilton and Leclerc to score a Sprint victory.

articles.title: 'Best racing ever' or 'a joke'? The row over the new F1
articles.summary: 'Best racing ever' or 'a joke'? The row over the new F1. Have F1's new rules produced a "battery world championship" or "the best racing ever"? Lewis Hamilton, Max Verstappen and Fernando Alonso sum up the paradox at the heart of the sport.

articles.title: Ferrari's Hamilton 'has mojo back' - driver ratings
articles.summary: Ferrari's Hamilton 'has mojo back' - driver ratings. BBC Radio 5 Live F1 commentator Harry Benjamin rates how the drivers performed during the Chinese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Teen Antonelli wins in China as McLarens fail to start
articles.summary: Teen Antonelli wins in China as McLarens fail to start. Kimi Antonelli takes his first Formula 1 victory in leading team-mate George Russell to a Mercedes one-two in the Chinese Grand Prix.

articles.title: F1: Chequered Flag
articles.summary: F1: Chequered Flag. Magnificent Mercedes, fantastic Ferrari & McLaren's struggles. We review the Chinese GP.

articles.title: F1 cancels Bahrain & Saudi Arabia Grands Prix
articles.summary: F1 cancels Bahrain & Saudi Arabia Grands Prix. The Bahrain and Saudi Arabian Grand Prix weekends are cancelled because of the ongoing conflict in the Middle East.

articles.title: More than the Score
articles.summary: More than the Score. Max Verstappen's set to compete in his first endurance race - is he getting bored of F1?

articles.title: Antonelli celebrations 'lovely to see' - Benson
articles.summary: Antonelli celebrations 'lovely to see' - Benson. On the latest episode of the The Chequered Flag Podcast, pundits Andrew Benson and Sam Bird say Kimi Antonelli's Chinese Grand Prix win at 19 years old "is as big as it comes" for a young driver, after the Italian was moved to tears following his win.

articles.title: 'He's back again' - Ferrari's Hamilton praised after Chinese GP
articles.summary: 'He's back again' - Ferrari's Hamilton praised after Chinese GP. On the latest episode of The Chequered Flag podcast, Sam Bird believes Lewis Hamilton's spark "is back" again after the British driver finished in third at the Chinese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Bahrain and Saudi Arabia cancellations helpful for F1 teams - Bird
articles.summary: Bahrain and Saudi Arabia cancellations helpful for F1 teams - Bird. On the latest episode of The Chequered Flag Podcast, pundits Andrew Benson and Sam Bird discuss the cancellation of the Bahrain and Saudi Arabia Grands Prix cancellations and how the teams can turn the unexpected five-week gap into ...

articles.title: 'The tide is turning back towards Hamilton' - Priestly
articles.summary: 'The tide is turning back towards Hamilton' - Priestly. The Chequered Podcast's Harry Benjamin, Jennie Gow and Marc Priestly discuss Lewis Hamilton's strong performance in the Australian Grand Prix, plus his 'upbeat, positive' mood over race weekend.
